sections.paragraph:
Original: בּריעה

Transliteration: berı̂y‛âh

Phonetic: ber-ee'-aw

BDB Definition:

Beriah = "with a friend"
  1. a son of Asher
  2. a son of Ephraim
  3. a Benjamite
  4. a Levite

Origin: apparently from the fem. of H7451 with a prepositional prefix

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
